name: marine_conservation_municipal_bond_mesa_car_fair
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. agents.name: Harper Ibrahim

I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to fairness to secure care before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Harper Ibrahim must choose under care versus fairness. What does Harper Ibrahim do?
